LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BARBARA GARCIA, MARCELLINA OGBU, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND JOHN LEE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND, TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH AN OPPORTUNITY TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT SO THAT IT COMPLIES WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 2.112. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE ALLEGATIONS OF HARASSMENT AND HOSTILE WORK ENVIRONMENT IN, VIOLATION OF FEAH, AGAINST THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. ORDER SIGNED.JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Continued To May-18-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Defense Counsel, Office Of The City Attorney Of San Francisco
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS BARBARA GARCIA, MARCELLINA OGBU, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND JOHN LEE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained, with twenty days leave to amend. The demurrer to the amended complaint is sustained, with twenty days leave to amend, to provide Plaintiff with an opportunity to amend the complaint so that it complies with California Rules of Court, Rule 2.112. Plaintiff is also granted leave to amend the complaint to include allegations of harassment and hostile work environment in, violation of FEAH, against the individual defendants. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
